title: duguetia neglecta
intro: Duguetia neglecta, also known as the 'Yellow Bells' or 'Yellow Trumpet', is a tropical plant species belonging to the Annonaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, among others. Duguetia neglecta can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and the extracts are also used in traditional herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
